commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: But. Hebrew, "and he will condemn the man of devices "(Mont.; Haydock) or, "the man of thoughts doth wickedly "(Calmet) as he trusts in them, rather than in God. (Menochius)

commentaries.author: Hippolytus of Rome
commentaries.content: Not from men, but with the Lord, will he obtain favour.
